name: BB:FalsePositive: SSH Server False Positive Categories
notes: Edit this BB to define all the false positive categories that occur to or from SSH servers that are defined in the BB:HostDefinition: SSH Servers building block.

conditions_text: when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: SSH Servers, BB:HostReference: SSH Servers
